summary: Tested Daily Tips API endpoints and frontend DailyTip component. All backend API tests pass (14/14). All frontend tests pass for Daily Tip functionality and WhatToEat branding.
passed_tests: GET /api/tips/today - Returns daily tip with title, body, expanded_content, sources
GET /api/tips/today?trimester=1 - Returns first trimester specific tip
GET /api/tips/today?trimester=2 - Returns second trimester specific tip
GET /api/tips/today?trimester=3 - Returns third trimester specific tip
GET /api/tips/today?trimester=5 - Returns 400 for invalid trimester
GET /api/tips/all - Returns all 30 tips (10 per trimester)
GET /api/tips/all?trimester=1 - Returns 10 first trimester tips
GET /api/tips/all?trimester=2 - Returns 10 second trimester tips
GET /api/tips/all?trimester=3 - Returns 10 third trimester tips
GET /api/tips/0 - Returns specific tip by index
GET /api/tips/5?trimester=2 - Returns tip with trimester filter
GET /api/tips/100 - Large index wraps around correctly (modulo)
GET /api/about - Returns app_name='WhatToEat' and mentions WhatToEat in description
GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns 'WhatToEat' in message
Daily Tip card displays on home page with amber styling
Daily Tip shows tip body text from API
Daily Tip has dismiss (X) button
Daily Tip has 'Read more' button
Clicking 'Read more' opens expanded modal with full content
Modal displays sources (WHO, CDC, NHS, ACOG)
Modal displays disclaimer about educational information
Clicking dismiss hides the Daily Tip
Dismissal persists to localStorage as date string
Daily Tip stays dismissed after page refresh
WhatToEat name appears in header across all pages
About page shows WhatToEat name and full app description

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Daily Tip and WhatToEat branding tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Tips feature fully tested and working. Tips API returns tips based on day of year and trimester filter. DailyTip component correctly fetches tips, shows expanded modal with sources, and dismissal persists in localStorage. App renamed from NurtureNote to WhatToEat throughout backend and frontend.
mocked_api_note: Social login buttons (Google, Apple, Facebook, Instagram) are UI-only - MOCKED

tips_api.get_today: Returns daily tip with title, body, expanded_content, sources
tips_api.get_all: Returns all 30 tips with counts per trimester
tips_api.get_by_index: Returns specific tip by index with wrap-around
tips_api.trimester_filter: Works on all endpoints (1, 2, 3 values accepted)

daily_tip_component.card_display: Amber styled card on home page
daily_tip_component.modal_content: Shows title, body, expanded_content, sources, disclaimer
daily_tip_component.localStorage_persistence: Saves date string to prevent tip showing again same day
